item.title: 1Gram
item.description: Name Description 1Gram you might have missed something here..,do it for the gram! This is related to the previous challenge [[writeup/bo1337-2022/back-to-the-future]] since it uses the same web portal but this time it has something to with Instagram Osint skills.

item.title: Back To The Future
item.description: Name Description Back To The Future Delorean if only we can see back our pass is it great?

item.title: Break The Storage
item.description: Name Description Break The Storage UNBattleOf1337, PwordBattleOf1337 This is a web challenge that shows the impact of a hard-coded credential which can be used by attackers to login as authenticated user on the web page.

item.title: Cat Dalmation
item.description: Name Description Cat-Dalmantion find the flag in side the cat… dang i can be a poet… wink* wink* This is a web challenge that shows an endpoint or file that accept both GET and POST request and shows a different response.

item.title: Heihawru
item.description: Name Description Heihawru seeitreaditthinkitsolveit 29 This challenge requires a bit of trial and error attempt since the file given contains a random strings but the pattern shows that it kinda like a poem with the formatting.

item.title: Rayquaza
item.description: Name Description Rayquanza I dont know How but.. i think the fat guy know something… maybe he has eaten your answer… good god Introduction This challenge requires us to use a GameBoy Emulator to run the given file.

item.title: Semerah Padi
item.description: Name Description Semerah Padi Mat Kilau inspected our logs and found someone downloading a file from a machine within the same network.

item.title: Sheng Xiao
item.description: Name Description Sheng Xiao Some where back in the 80’s or maybe 70’s used to be a very mysterious killer Introduction This challenge is quite straight forward since I have encountered this challenge previously.

item.title: Simplify
item.description: Name Description Simplify Jst gosstan me, We were given a file named crackme and upon executing the file, we require to enter a correct code to receive the flag !

item.title: Snap
item.description: Name Description Snap keep stalking maybe you will find some else quick queestion what is kilogram minus kilo?

item.title: Streamline
item.description: Name Description Streamline We’ve been investigating Mr. Ridzuan lately, we can feel he’s doing some illegal activities.

item.title: 🐇 AliceInWonderland
item.description: Name Description AliceInWonderland Welcome to Rabbit Spice Sir and Madam Please view or pricing and do contact us if you have any inquires This is a web challenge that reflects the name of the challenge because it is full of rabbit holes.
